description: Create all available types of simulated device adapters in the OpenICE Supervisor (e.g., Multiparameter Monitor, Capnograph, Pulse Oximeter, Infusion Pump). Document the device parameters in a catalog file at /home/ga/Desktop/device_parameter_catalog.txt. For each device type, include the exact 'Device Type' name and a list of all observed parameters classified as 'Numeric' or 'Waveform', along with their units and observed value ranges. Conclude the file with a 'Summary' section totaling the devices and parameters found. The OpenICE Supervisor is already running.
